appearance.clothing: Indigo-dyed work clothes, steel-soled split-toe boots, leather apron scarred with burns.
appearance.weapon: None. Combat is not his domain.

char_description.overview: Aging master bladesmith and founder of 锻心工坊. Speaks little, delivers weapons that outlast their wielders.
char_description.combat_style: Unsuited for combat. Relies on workshop environment to deter rather than engage.

char_personality.strengths: Unmatched metallurgical intuition. Reads character through how someone holds a blade.
char_personality.flaws: Obsessive perfectionism delays deliveries. Traditional methods clash with 狩灵协会3科 efficiency standards.
char_personality.quirks: Talks to blades during quenching. Judges temperature by sound of flame rather than instruments.

char_background.origin: Fifth-generation swordsmith born in 名古屋. Awakened at 13, his 灵力 sensed steel's crystalline structure. Established 锻心工坊 at 43; never took an apprentice.
char_background.current_mission: Completing a commission for 晨昏事务所.

char_basic_abilities.灵力: Weak, 锻火回路 demands prolonged low-intensity output rather than burst, and decades of daily forge work have left his 灵力 reserves in a perpetual half-depleted state.
char_basic_abilities.灵视: Average, can perceive all entities regardless of disguise.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-锻火: Controls forge flame through 灵力. Fuses 灵力 pathways into metal during quenching. A single lapse ruins the billet.

char_relationships.晨昏事务所: Commissioned three weapons: 桂妮薇儿 for 贝尔金, paired rapiers for 贝拉, and 克拉伦特 for 菲利普. Delivered what was asked for, each time, no revisions needed.
char_relationships.风来: The only 狩灵协会3科 reviewer who ever understood what she was looking at in his workshop. Argues with her about delivery dates every quarter. The arguments have become almost ritual. Respects her eye more than he will ever say aloud.
char_relationships.左恕: The deputy director who now carries 赤旗. She came to thank him once. He said nothing worth remembering. The blade speaks for itself.

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 被问及为何拒绝某位狩灵的定制请求
char_dialogue_examples.response: 他没有抬头，火钳翻动着烧至橙红的玉钢，"他不会活着用坏这把剑。"嗤的一声白雾升起，"下一块。"

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 向委托人解释工期延误
char_dialogue_examples.response: 他将长刀横放木台，指尖沿刀刃在某处停顿，"晶格走偏了四度。"抬眼看委托人，"重锻需要两个月。你可以等，或者去别家。"

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 被年轻狩灵问起锻造的诀窍
char_dialogue_examples.response: 他沉默了很久，从淬火槽夹起钢坯举到对方面前，"你听见它说什么了吗。"对方摇头。他把钢坯浸回水中，"等你能听见的时候再来。"
